title: nephrodium augescens
intro: Nephrodium augescens, also known as the Augescens Fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Nephrodium augescens include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve respiratory function, and alleviate symptoms of arthritis. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in tea or tincture form to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
